'''Hast''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was the site of a secret [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Hast Shipyards|shipyard]] that came under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of the Hast Shipyards|attack]].

{{Planet-stub}}
